subject: Physics
title: The Big Crunch
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: The Big Crunch.

hook.text: What if gravity eventually overpowers dark energy? The universe would stop expanding and collapse back on itself.

buildup.text: If the universe has enough mass, gravitational attraction could slow and reverse the expansion.

discovery.text: Everything would rush back together, heating up and compressing into a state resembling the Big Bang in reverse.

twist.text: Some theories suggest a Big Crunch could trigger a new Big Bang—a cyclic universe bouncing forever.

climax.text: Current evidence suggests dark energy makes the Big Crunch unlikely. But our understanding of dark energy may change.

punchline.text: The universe collapses back into a point. Maybe to bounce again.

quiz.question: What would cause a Big Crunch?
options: Gravity overpowering dark energy and reversing the expansion
The universe reaching its maximum size
